rdf:Description.rdfs:label: Extreme Temperature Charging Time
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Data element representing time spent charging in extreme temperatures for a battery item. Its representation type (e.g., histogram) is indicated via usesRepresentation.

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: Representation Type
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Abstract representation style for a data element (e.g., histogram).

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: hasAgingParameter
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Attaches a reified AgingParameter to a measurement DataElement (e.g., self-discharge rate) to answer: 'What is the current self-discharge rate of a battery item at a given aging parameter?'

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: hasApplicableException
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Links a DataElement to an Exception that applies to it. Used to answer: 'Does the non-cycle application exception apply to the number of full charging and discharging cycles of a battery item recorded in the battery passport?'

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: hasMeasurementTime
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Attaches a reified timestamp (MeasurementTime) to a DataElement. Used to qualify time-varying measurements (e.g., self-discharge rate, operating temperature) with xsd:dateTimeStamp as required.

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: Unit
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Unit of measurement for a ValueElement (e.g., '°C' for temperature, '%/month' for self-discharge). Used to answer: 'What unit is used to express temperature information in a battery passport?'

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: New Passport Issuance
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: A requirement data element indicating when a new DPP must be issued; qualified by triggeredByOperation for operations like remanufacturing, repurposing, and preparation for re-use/repurposing.

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: Processing Operation
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: An operation that may change a battery's status (e.g., remanufacturing, repurposing, preparation for re-use). Used to trigger new passport issuance requirements.

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: triggeredByOperation
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Indicates which ProcessingOperation(s) trigger the issuance of a new battery passport for an item. Used to answer: 'When must a new battery passport be issued for a battery item that has been subject to remanufacturing, repurposing, or treatment preparing for re-use or repurposing?'

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: Aging Parameter
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Reified qualifier for measurements capturing the aging parameter (e.g., SOH, calendar age). Used with hasAgingParameter.

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: hasSelfDischargeRateValue
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Links a SelfDischargeRate DataElement to its value element, enabling unit and value capture for the rate.

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: Self-Discharge Rate Value
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Value element carrying the numeric self-discharge rate and its unit (via DataElement_Unit).

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: Battery Identifier
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Item-level identifier recorded in the DPP. Linked via aboutBatteryItem to the BatteryItem it identifies to verify correct level of granularity.

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: hasTemperatureValue
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Links a temperature-related DataElement to its temperature value element, enabling unit and value capture for operating environmental temperature conditions.

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: Battery Item
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: An individual battery for which a passport may be issued and item-level data are recorded. Used as the anchor for counting passports and scoping item-level identifiers and measurements.

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: requiresDataElement
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Declares that a BatteryCategory requires a specific DataElement to be recorded in the battery passport. Used to answer: 'Which battery categories require the date of putting the battery into service to be recorded in the battery passport?' by selecting BatteryCategory that require ServiceStartDate.

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: Full Cycle Count
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Number of full charging and discharging cycles of a battery item, recorded in the DPP. Classified as a DynamicDataAttribute to answer whether it is static or dynamic; exceptions can be linked via hasApplicableException.

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: hasBatteryPassport
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Links a BatteryItem to the DPP(s) attributed to it. Used to answer: 'How many battery passports are attributed to a single battery item?' by counting the DPPs linked via this property.

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: Preparation for Re-use or Repurposing
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: ProcessingOperation subclass representing treatment operations preparing for re-use or repurposing.

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: Exception
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: A regulatory exception that may apply to a data element recorded in the DPP.

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: Measurement Time
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Reified time qualifier for measurements; its timestamp is given via DataElement_Value with xsd:dateTimeStamp. Used with hasMeasurementTime.

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: aboutBatteryItem
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Associates any DataElement in a DPP with the BatteryItem it describes. Used to verify that a battery identifier relates to the battery item level of granularity, and to scope measurements (e.g., temperature, cycles, self-discharge) to the correct item.

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: Remanufacturing
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: ProcessingOperation subclass representing remanufacturing.

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: Periodic Data Element
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: A multi-valued data element intended for periodically recorded observations, each qualified by time via hasMeasurementTime.

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: Battery Category
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Regulatory category of batteries (e.g., portable, LMT, EV, industrial). Linked via requiresDataElement to mandated data (e.g., ServiceStartDate).

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: Self-Discharge Rate
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: A measurement data element for the battery item's self-discharge rate. Uses value elements for the rate (hasSelfDischargeRateValue), the measurement time (hasMeasurementTime), and the aging parameter (hasAgingParameter).

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: usesRepresentation
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Specifies how a DataElement is represented (e.g., histogram). Used to answer: 'Does the battery passport use histograms to represent the time spent charging in extreme temperatures for a battery item?'

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: Dynamic Data Attribute
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Marker class for data elements whose values may change over time in the DPP. Used to classify attributes for CQ on static vs dynamic.

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: Operating Environmental Temperature
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Periodically recorded operating environmental temperature conditions for a battery item. Uses hasTemperatureValue (with DataElement_Unit) and hasMeasurementTime. Presence in a DPP answers whether such periodic information is included.

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: Static Data Attribute
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Marker class for data elements whose values do not change over time in the DPP. Used to classify attributes for CQ on static vs dynamic.

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: Repurposing
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: ProcessingOperation subclass representing repurposing.

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: Non-Cycle Application Exception
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Specific exception indicating non-cycle application conditions. Used with hasApplicableException to check if it applies to FullCycleCount.

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: Histogram Representation
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: RepresentationType indicating that the data element is expressed as a histogram.

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: Temperature Value
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Value element carrying a temperature measurement and its unit (via DataElement_Unit) for operating environmental temperature conditions.

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: Service Start Date
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Date/time when the battery is put into service. Categories that require this in the DPP are linked via requiresDataElement.
